note: Monday - Paranoia. Bad day! Mum had enough. Details: AA form with AgeUK - triggered stress and ultimately started Paranoia episode - unable to convince Dad this was to help him. Accused John of wrecking the house and me recking the flat. Mum had a nightmare day being accused of stealing his money etc. Cottage pie for dinner.

Tuesday - Paranoia. Bad morning. Details: More of the same - lots of paranoia and accusing of money being taken. Mum managed to bring him around by showing bank statements and taking him out for a few hours to garden centre and a small walk. He was much better and himself in the evening when I rang. Fish for dinner.

Wednesday - Depression. Bad morning. Details: Started the day Depressed. Perked up after a sleep and the afternoon was much better where he chatted with carer enthusiastically. Spoke to him after dinner - more with it it seemed. Fish for dinner.
Thursday - More Normal.

Friday - More Normal. Bit confused in conversation around 5-6pmish but was able to have a conversation some of the time. Then he went on a bit of a ramble and I wasn't sure what he was talking about but John managed to follow some of it.
Saturday - Ok today until at least afternoon.
Sunday - good.
Monday - good
Tuesday - good
Wednesday - good
Thursday - Good
Good form - seemed normal - though didn't sleep well and was up until early hours.
Saturday - Paranoid today - not in good frame of mind.
Sunday - still not in as good frame of mind.
Monday - good
Tuesday - good
Wednesday - Good
Thursday - Good
Friday - Good form / tired and early night in evening - in bed by 9pm.
Saturday -
Sunday - Good day
Monday - good
Tuesday - Good

Wednesday - Dad was ok but had nightmares night before - Heard about Ambrose. We collectively decided not to hinder Dad's recovery. John and Maura were ok with this and also didn't want dad to suffer in his recovery.
Thursday - Good after more sleep
Friday - Dad had some bad dreams last night and was paranoid about things under the bed so didn't sleep well. Better after more rest.
Saturday - Good day
Sunday - Good day
Monday - Good day - impressive recall and conversation
Tuesday - Good day - psychologist visited
Wednesday - Good day - Antonio and dad chatted about composers/Vienna - excellent conversation in eve
Thursday - Good day - very with it last day or so - Charlotte/Keeley visited
Friday - Good day - watching volcano programme and very good attention span
Saturday - Good day
Sunday - Good day
Monday - Good Day
Tuesday - Good day
Wednesday - Went for a walk. Fine all day. Paranoid in evening about scam - solicitors bill arrived
Thursday - A bit wandery at night - mentioned cramping on hands and itching on arm- had been with occ therapists in town today
Friday - Pretty good - seems more like himself - skin better and had a rest at 6pm. Remembered about watch bought him for Christmas. Stll got a rash.
Saturday - good
Sunday - good
Monday - good
Tuesday - good day - bit wandery in morning and had a restful day lots of sleep and didnt go out
Wednesday - good day - swelling on leg/ankle but very with it conversationally today
Thursday - good
Friday - good
Saturday - Easter - depressed until later but slept poorly
Sunday - Easter - good today and more with it - Michael visited in evening and said he was very good (not depressed) and they had a good chat about work and working with Americans
Monday - seemed ok in the morning - went awol to town in afternoon / evening - found in tescos

Tuesday - slept ok overnight - sort of with it this morning - by evening not sure he knew faversham at all - turned out he was trying to remember living in crayford before i was born, so he got the map out to investigate and felt reassured after. Also remembered discussions with Michael after his visit on sunday.
Wednesday - Sounded ok on the phone - had walked to town with Charlotte and tired after
Thursday - Not good or very cooperative - mum poorly too
Friday - Bad day - couldn't understand that he was already in his own house - collecting things - wanting to go - getting unsettled
Saturday - Better day after sleep - I was poorly and he could tell I was too poorly to make it down later in the week
Sunday - A bit up and down
Monday - Better
Tuesday - Scan day - ok but complained about the music selection
Wednesday - a bit paranoid and confused but very tired.
Thursday - Paranoid at first that car was being sold - managed to talk him through and fix the confusion. Wants to come up north soon.
Friday - Ok but a few moments and phone calls
Saturday - Had a good day - went out with Michael and Lisa
Sunday - Dad had a better sleep and was asking what I was up to. Was telling him I was sorting the wedding bits out to sell.
Monday - Not so well slept last night - wasn't quite as with it but thats normal when hes tired.
Tuesday - Slept much better last night and was more able to hold conversation.

Wednesday - Spoke to him on the phone before we went out and he was in good spirits. He understood what I'd told him and asked was the concert in Leeds which I was impressed by. He wished us both to have a good time.
Thursday - Dad did a walk with Kate today and she said he did very well. Dad was happy to go out and do this and was fine.
Friday - with it today and was watching his Maigret dvd which was holding his attention well. Didn't want to disturb this so left him to enjoy this.
Saturday - Dad was in good spirits.
Sunday - Dad was asking if I was coming down to see him - he knew I was coming down soon but unfortunately had to cancel due to being poorly.

Monday - got up at 3am thinking it was time for work and he had to get to london so got washed and had a shave then realised that he didnt need to do this and went back to bed - was fine after more sleep for rest of day.
Tuesday - Dad answered phone to me and went to get mum to talk to me.
Wednesday - Dad had been fine that day

Thursday - had meeting with occ therapists and concerned about their decision - need more details as no minutes of meeting provided. Texted Charlotte to ask for someone to email more questions to - awaiting response.

Friday - Dad saw John Beattie and they had excellent conversation together. John could see the progress dad had made and texted me to tell me how impressed he was with his progress since the last time they spoke.Dad was a bit concerned earlier in evening about the meeting yesterday but considering news the day before from the therapist he was in good spirits and was joking and laughing which was nice to see.
Saturday - had a bit of a strop about going out then went out and wanted to go on a long journey. Later in evening he was fine and smiling and happy.
Sunday - OK

Monday - Dad was concerned about the meeting thursday - he answered phone to me and then decided to sit and talk me through the document that the occ therapist left on thurs. He jotted notes down on it and was concerned what it all meant. He remembered that he'd read the document earlier in the day and hadnt finished going through it before presenting his findings to me.
Tuesday - Fine after talking to Antonio - was very concerned about the legal doc served in the meeting thursday with no context on what happens next
Wednesday - Fine in the day - poor sleep overnight - awake at 3am and back to be 4am
Thursday - Very poor sleep and slow to get dressed - 7pm - refused dinner and tablets but settled an hour later
Friday - Fine today
Saturday - A bit tired yesterday and walking a bit but lacked energy so rested when back.
Sunday - A bit worried earlier in the day but in the evening relaxed with some music. Found watch I bought him for Christmas and he told me the time which was correct.
Monday - Better

Tuesday - Woke up a bit confused - thought he was in Belfast in child family home. Fails to sometimes know if hes awake and living things or dreaming. However spoke to him later in the evening and he recognised that he'd been out during the day over the road to Aldi with mum and then was able to tell me that he'd woken up this morning after shutting his eyes briefly (sleeping) then realising he was actually at home. Thought it was good that after thinking time/processing time he knew he wasn't in Belfast and it had been a dream.
Wednesday - ok
Thursday - Shattered today but good.
Friday - Focussed on dvd - good.

Saturday - Very with it today. Remembered a lot. Asked when I was coming down. Said tomorrow. Asked where he should meet me - knew where the station was and that the train takes two hours from York for me.
Sunday - Met at station - dad was fascinated by musicians playing at station - confused about my arrival - keen to go to the concert later but he wouldnt have managed - using walking stick
Monday - good
Tuesday - good
Wednesday - good - just tired - me in Germany
Thursday - dad came down to meet me with mum - good - me back from Germany late
Friday - Fine - went to whitstable - food then shop then home - dad did a lot of walking and walked well
Saturday - Fine early on - shopping in Canterbury - sorted phone - ended in bad day - Dad was quite upsetting when talking to me / quite rude and not himself
Sunday - Not good. Dad wandery and taking papers and rearranging and mum getting annoyed - tensions high.
Monday - Everyone better today. Took him food shopping - good mindset - pushed trolley around
Tuesday - came to station to wave me off - got results from hospital scan - ray and mad down
Wed - fine - did some walking
Thurs - fine - went out but tired so rested and out for dinner
Fri - fine - took a little while to know who was at home and who wasn't - tired and needed rest
Saturday - good
Sunday - good
Monday - good
Tuesday - good
Wednesday - a bit confused most of the day - tells us hes confused - mum says hes drinking a lot though
Thursday - good most of the day - apparently a bit bothered this morning then fine for rest of day
Friday - good
Saturday - Good
Sunday - Good
Monday - Good
Tuesday - Good
Wednesday - Good
Thursday - Good - watched football - confused by events in Belfast
